info.title: Total CMS API
info.description: Complete REST API for Total CMS - A modern flat-file content management system

tags.name: streaming
tags.description: File streaming operations with range request support

content.example: This is the content of my blog post...

get.description: Get a list of all collections in the CMS
Get all objects from a collection with optional filtering and pagination

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of objects to return

post.description: Create a new object in the collection

delete.description: Delete a collection and all its objects

get.description: Get the collection index with object summaries and optional filtering

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Include filter - comma-separated field:value pairs (AND logic). Example: published:true,featured:true. For array fields like tags, checks if value exists in array (case-insensitive).

parameters.name: exclude
parameters.description: Exclude filter - comma-separated field:value pairs (OR logic). Example: draft:true,archived:true. Objects matching ANY criteria are excluded.

put.description: Rebuild the collection index from all objects

get.description: Get the schema definition for a collection
Get a specific object by ID

delete.description: Delete an object from the collection

post.description: Create a copy of an existing object

id.description: New object ID (optional, will be auto-generated if not provided)

post.description: Upload a file to a gallery or depot property

put.description: Update a specific property of an object

delete.description: Delete a property from an object

post.description: Create a subfolder within a depot (multi-file) property

delete.description: Clear cached files for a property (e.g., processed images)

post.description: Create a new card/item in a deck property

get.description: Get a specific deck item by ID

delete.description: Delete a deck item from the deck property

put.description: Update metadata for a specific item in a property (e.g., image alt text, file metadata)

patch.description: Partially update metadata for a property item

delete.description: Delete a specific file from a depot (multi-file) property
Clear cached versions of a specific file (e.g., processed images)

put.description: Move or rename a file within a depot property

get.description: Get a list of all available schemas
Get an image with applied processing parameters
Download a file from an object property

parameters.name: inline
parameters.description: Display in browser instead of download

get.description: Download a specific file from a depot (multi-file) property with Content-Disposition: attachment
Stream a file with Content-Disposition: inline and HTTP range request support. Ideal for video/audio files.

parameters.name: Range
parameters.description: HTTP range request for partial content

get.description: Stream a specific file from a depot (multi-file) property with range request support

parameters.name: Range
parameters.description: HTTP range request for partial content

get.description: Generate RSS feed for a collection
Generate XML sitemap for a collection
Public endpoint for clearing all caches when admin interface is inaccessible. No authentication required - accessible from any location for customer self-service.

caches_cleared.description: List of cache types that were cleared

post.description: Send email via form submission with rate limiting. Useful for contact forms and notifications.
Upload file via Froala WYSIWYG editor. Used internally by the styled text editor.

get.description: Retrieve file uploaded via Froala editor

delete.description: Delete file uploaded via Froala editor
